title: Panthers Trade QB Andy Dalton to Eagles
summary: Andy Dalton traded to Eagles after three seasons as backup QB for the Panthers.

title: Queens Royals Make NCAA Tournament Debut
summary: Queens University of Charlotte celebrates its men's basketball team's first NCAA Tournament appearance.

title: Family Dollar to Close Matthews Distribution Center
summary: Family Dollar to close Matthews distribution center by mid-2026, resulting in nearly 400 layoffs.
charlotte_impact: Job losses will impact the local economy and the affected workers and families.

title: Cooler Weather Expected This Week

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP

title: Why Charlotte Didn't See Snow
summary: Atmospheric conditions prevented a band of snow from reaching the ground in Charlotte.
